entities.name: GENDER POWER
entities.description: The social dynamics and influence of different genders within a community used to drive development)

entities.name: COLLECTIVE ACTION
entities.description: Coordinated efforts by a group of individuals to achieve a common goal)

entities.description: A holistic approach to managing land and water resources within a watershed to ensure sustainability)

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of land caused by human activities or natural processes)

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs)

entities.description: Structured initiatives and policy frameworks aimed at improving watershed health and productivity)

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Regions characterized by a lack of sufficient water for agriculture and high vulnerability to degradation)
